prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: 2D battle VFX texture for a Pokemon-style grass attack
Primary request: create a compact cluster of sharp leaf shard accents for a grass impact burst
Scene/backdrop: transparent background, isolated effect only, no background
Subject: effect only, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI
Style/medium: premium polished game VFX asset with crisp botanical motion and readable energy structure
Composition/framing: clustered leaf blades fanning outward from a small center, tightly framed for overlay use, isolated accent layer
Lighting/mood: fresh impact spark, energetic and clean
Color palette: emerald, lime, pale yellow-green, muted forest-green shadows
Materials/textures: sharp leaf edges, subtle vein detail, thin highlights, clean alpha
Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no environment, no card frame
Avoid: beams, trails, petals, flowers, black background, checkerboard, solid backdrop, overly soft mist
Important negative constraints: keep the shards readable at small size, avoid a full bloom explosion, keep the element as a support accent rather than the main subject
